name: Car Title Loans Henderson Ltd by Progreso Title Loans
description_short: Car title loan lender in Henderson, NV offering fast cash loans secured by vehicle titles. Phone-based service at 170 N Green Valley Parkway.
description_long:
Car Title Loans Henderson Ltd by Progreso Title Loans is a title lending operation located in Henderson, Nevada, positioned within the emergency cash lending sector. The company operates under the Progreso Title Loans brand, suggesting it is part of a larger title loan network. The business is listed at 170 N Green Valley Parkway, Suite 300, in Henderson, and can be reached at 702-213-4054. Based on the business category and branding, the company specializes in providing quick access to cash by using vehicle titles as collateral.

Title loans are short-term emergency loans where borrowers pledge their car's title in exchange for immediate cash. This type of lending is designed for consumers facing urgent financial needs who may lack access to traditional credit products. The Henderson location suggests the company serves the Las Vegas metropolitan area and surrounding regions. As part of the Progreso Title Loans network, the company likely follows standardized lending procedures and terms associated with that larger organization.

The company maintains a local presence through a physical office address and dedicated phone line, distinguishing it from purely online title lenders. This physical location may provide borrowers with face-to-face service options for loan applications and consultations. The Progreso branding indicates the company may offer bilingual or culturally-focused services, given the Hispanic-oriented brand positioning common in the Progreso network.

Title loans are high-cost emergency borrowing products, typically carrying interest rates and fees significantly higher than traditional personal loans or bank financing. Borrowers should understand that defaulting on a title loan risks vehicle repossession. This product is best suited only for genuine short-term cash emergencies when no other financing options are available, and borrowers should carefully evaluate repayment capacity before proceeding.
address: 170 N Green Valley Pkwy #300, Henderson, NV 89012

company_info.headquarters: 170 N Green Valley Pkwy #300, Henderson, NV 89012

pros: Local physical office location in Henderson enables in-person loan consultations and applications
Dedicated phone line (702-213-4054) provides direct customer contact access
Part of established Progreso Title Loans network suggests operational consistency and experience
Located in accessible commercial area at Green Valley Parkway with available parking
Title loans provide faster funding than traditional bank loans for qualified applicants
cons: Website content is minimal and does not disclose interest rates, fees, or loan terms
Title loans carry significantly higher costs and APRs compared to personal loans and bank products
Vehicle repossession risk if loan payments are not made, putting borrower's transportation at stake
No information available about loan amounts, repayment periods, or qualification requirements
best_for: Consumers with urgent short-term cash needs and no access to traditional financing
Vehicle owners facing immediate financial emergencies who can repay within weeks
Borrowers in the Henderson/Las Vegas area seeking in-person lending services
diagnosis: Car Title Loans Henderson Ltd is designed for consumers experiencing genuine financial emergencies who own vehicles outright and need immediate cash. The primary caveat is that title loans are high-cost products with rates and fees substantially above traditional lending—borrowers should only pursue this option after exhausting other alternatives, and must be certain of their ability to repay before pledging vehicle titles.
